author: doll-agent
content:
Add NaN/Inf input validation in three places where non-finite values silently produce garbage:

1. mapping::validate_domain_window: reject domain/window endpoints that aren't finite (used by all 6 polynomial bases via with_domain/with_window).
2. roots::find_roots_from_power_coeffs: reject non-finite coefficients before companion-matrix eigendecomposition (would otherwise return NaN roots).
3. fitting::least_squares_fit: reject non-finite Vandermonde matrix entries and y values; weight non-finite check is already covered by the existing #256 negative-weight rejection.

Add 7 tests: 3 in roots.rs (NaN, Inf, NegInf coefficients), 4 in power.rs (NaN in y, Inf in x, NaN domain endpoint, Inf window endpoint).
